_comment: Explicit, deterministic capability classification for the steuerboard CLI surface. Every invocable command produced by steuerboard.cli.build_parser() must appear here exactly once. Classification is declared here on purpose and is never guessed from help text. When a CLI command is added, removed, or renamed, update this file and run `make docs`; tests/test_cli_surface_docs.py and `generate_cli_surface.py --check` fail until parser and classification agree.

categories.read_only: Reads, observes, or runs a bounded read-only command; no repository mutation and no network access.
categories.derivation_only: Pure transformation or artifact validation producing preview/derived artifacts; no repository mutation, no network access, no execution.
categories.fetch_only: Performs exactly one bounded network fetch and writes evidence; no working-tree mutation.
categories.mutating_stage_d: Bounded Stage-D executor that performs exactly one mutating Git operation behind an action-specific readiness gate.
